content:
Hello! Im Sơn , just call me Aegis 
Im Vietnamese . I big fan of Turnbase and roguelike game . Also im simp Ryker <:cuti_patootie:1325137090362474517>  I will try help translate to Vietnamese when i can and hope more people at Viet Nam will enjoy the game .

Hello, it's Cassius. I suppose I count as a native English speaker who simply loves learning other languages and I'm joining the volunteer team from today as promised. I admire how well written the cn version of Morimens is and therefore think it deserves a proper translation, so, I'm here to help with CN -> ENG translation and proof reading. I may also be able to provide some help with CN -> ESP translation and proof reading as well. Looking forward to working with everyone and growing the Morimens global community with high quality localization!
